sglang.title: Feat: upgrade outlines & support compatibility with the old version
sglang.author: gobraves
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
#2276
upgrade outlines & support compatibility with the old version
Due to vLLM limitations, outlines is restricted to versions >= 0.0.43 and < 0.1. If you update the outlines version in pyproject.toml and use pip install "sglang[all]", the actual version of outlines will still remain bel

sglang.title: Add a simple torch native attention backend
sglang.author: YangQun1
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Add a torch_native attention backend, which only relies on PyTorch native operations and fully bypass triton and flashinfer.
This backend can be used for debug or as an reference impl for devices that not support triton/flashinfer.

sglang.title: Online weight updates from torch.distributed
sglang.author: zhaochenyang20
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation

Following OpenRLHF's vllm wrapper, we support online weights updates from torch.distributed, which is hundreds of times quicker than saving the model to disk and updating the engine from disk.
Following these PRs:
#2265
#2266
Modifications
I added three APIs in the server and engine, and

vllm.title: [doc] add warning about comparing hf and vllm outputs
vllm.author: youkaichao
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
A lesson learned from #1069 (comment) .
In our ci, we always use do_sample=False for huggingface models, so it is not a problem.

vllm.title: [Misc] Adding `MMMU-Pro` vision dataset to serving benchmark
vllm.author: ywang96
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR adds the support for MMMU-Pro vision dataset to the serving benchmark. This dataset is image-token-heavy (single image with average resolution of 1700x1600) and comes with a generic short text prompt, as describe in the dataset model card:

Vision: In this subset, questions are embedded with

vllm.title: [Core] Implement disagg prefill by StatelessProcessGroup
vllm.author: KuntaiDu
vllm.bodyExcerpt: A light-weight implementation of disaggregated prefill. I switched from PR #8498 to here in order to fix DCO issues.

FIX #9967

Add BNB support to Llava and Pixtral-HF model

vllm.title: [core] Avoid metrics log noise when idle - include speculative decodi…
vllm.author: cduk
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
…ng and prefix cache noise
Patch #8868 reduces log noise when idle, but misses log noise from speculative decoding and prefix cache metrics.
This patch brings these into the same filter.
FIX #8868 #8868

vllm.title: [Kernel] Use `out` in flash_attn_varlen_func
vllm.author: WoosukKwon
vllm.bodyExcerpt: This PR uses the in-place out argument of flash_attn_varlen_func to avoid redundant copy. This is possible by the change in vllm-project/flash-attention#32

vllm.title: Fill TorchSDPAAttentionMetadata seq_lens_field for prefill
vllm.author: maxdebayser
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Fix attempt for #10738
In the TorchSDPAAttentionMetadata the seq_lens_tensor is empty for prefill. It looks like this is the case because it was assumed that this field is not necessary for prefill since it's not used for _run_sdpa_forward. But in Roberta models we need to know how long each sequenc
